title: wyred contract v0 — ECO pin-map diff (.pinmapdiff.json)
description: Descriptive schema for the ECO / lifecycle pin-map diff, emitted once (watchy_v1_draft_btn3, the incumbent-seeded re-solve). Source: wyred/paths.py `diff_pinmaps` (which returns stamp_a/stamp_b/allocation/terminals/components_only_in_a/components_only_in_b) PLUS the two keys emit.py adds (`incumbents`, `minimal_disturbance_violations`). There is NO prose (F1). Eight keys, all always emitted. `allocation` buckets demand ids by added/changed/removed; `terminals` lists per-(refdes,terminal) net changes with NULLABLE `a`/`b` sides (a=old net, b=new net; null on the side where the terminal was absent — F9/F3-adjacent). `stamp_a`/`stamp_b` reuse the shared stamp $def (non-null; both compared maps carry a stamp). additionalProperties:false throughout.

incumbents.description: the incumbent artifact this emit was diffed against (emit.py adds this key)

allocation.description: allocation-row deltas keyed by demand id, bucketed. All three arrays always present; each holds demand-id strings, sorted. All empty means the allocations agree.

terminals.description: per-terminal net changes between the two maps (empty means every terminal's net agrees).

components_only_in_a.description: sorted refdes present only in the incumbent (side a) component set.

components_only_in_b.description: sorted refdes present only in the re-solve (side b) component set.

minimal_disturbance_violations.description: human-readable violation strings from emit.py `_check_incumbency` (a solver-chosen incumbent entry that moved although its unit stayed free). [] means minimal disturbance held.

terminal_delta.description: One (refdes, terminal) whose net differs between the two maps (diff_pinmaps `term_changes`). `a` is the incumbent net, `b` is the re-solve net; each is `string|null` — null on the side where the terminal carried no net (Optional[str] from `t.get("net")`), and every golden row has exactly one non-null side. refdes/terminal always strings. All four keys always emitted.
